voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Sự bão hòa của đau buồn, khi cơ thể không thể chứa thêm nữa và bắt đầu loại bỏ mọi thứ khác.
voice_adherence.fix: Replace this abstract psychological explanation with a physical sensation from the vocabulary wells. Example: 'Dạ dày co thắt. Não báo đầy. Không còn kênh nào để truyền đau.'
voice_adherence.note: The chapter captures the clinical tone and technical vocabulary wells well in stretches, but frequently collapses into emotional exposition that violates the 'Body Before Emotion' principle. The voice profile demands observations of system failures and physical details, not internal psychological explanations. Too many passages tell us what Cường feels rather than showing his body malfunctioning.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: Beat 4 (Cường đưa ra lựa chọn: Anh sẽ hy sinh chính mình) is delivered through internal narration rather than a concrete, irreversible action.
beat_coverage.fix: The decision should crystallize through a physical act — his hand moving to the confirm button, or a line of code being typed that cannot be undone. The current version has him thinking about sacrifice but ending on 'đổ bộ để quay về,' which is intention, not action.
beat_coverage.note: All four outline beats are present but executed as summary rather than dramatization. Beat 1 (system collapsing) is told via ping numbers rather than shown through malfunctioning equipment. Beat 3 (scar fading) is stated rather than discovered through physical examination. The chapter reads like a report of decisions rather than a man making them.

character_voice.weakest_moment: Ý nghĩ ấy đến như một dao lạnh xuyên qua ngực. Không phảng phất. Rõ ràng. Sắc nét.
character_voice.fix: Replace with a sensation from Cường's vocabulary: 'Ý nghĩ ấy đến như một packet loss toàn bộ. Không cảnh báo. Không handshake. Chỉ là đứt.' This maintains his technical worldview instead of switching to generic metaphor.
character_voice.note: Cường's voice is inconsistent. In strong moments he speaks in data points and system diagnostics ('Ping: 347ms. 502ms. 89ms.'). In weak moments he sounds like any literary protagonist having feelings. The voice profile specifies 90% statements, short sentences, counting/measuring — but the chapter gives us long emotional passages that could belong to any narrator.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The note from Ch 15 is resolved through direct explanation: 'Một phần của anh đã biết rằng ký ức sẽ bị ghi đè... Và phần ấy đã viết mảnh giấy này.'
plants_seeded.fix: Let the reader connect the dots. Show Cường looking at the note, show his hand twitching with muscle memory of writing it, but don't explain WHY he wrote it. The reason can emerge through action in the next chapter.
plants_seeded.note: The fading scar is well-seeded as a physical indicator of Lan's decline. The note resolution is too explicit — it explains rather than evokes. Good plants make readers feel clever; this one spoon-feeds.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Ý nghĩ ấy đến như một dao lạnh xuyên qua ngực.
prose_quality.fix: Delete or replace with a specific physical sensation: 'Dạ dày co lại. Ruột sôi. Axít dâng lên thực quản.'
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Tiếng nấc — nhỏ, khô, đau — bật ra từ cổ họng anh như tiếng máy in hết mực: cạch, cạch, cạch, cố in nhưng không có gì ra.
prose_quality.note: Sentence variety is poor — many consecutive sentences start with 'Anh' or 'Cường.' The ping interjections provide good rhythm breaks but are overused as a crutch. The strongest prose happens when technical language collides with physical sensation. The weakest prose happens when the narrator explains emotions abstractly. The Chinese character '挣扎' appears unexplained in 'Bốn mươi phần trăm còn lại đang挣扎' — likely a generation artifact.

continuity.note: Emotional continuity from the previous chapter is strong — Cường's devastation in the hospital room carries into this chapter's numbness. The physical details (cold hands, empty crying) track well. However, the previous chapter ended with him at 2:47 AM having already cried everything out; this chapter has him crying again and then being described as 'không phải khóc — anh đã khóc hết nước mắt ở Khu Nằm,' which is slightly contradictory in execution.

violations: Chapter states Cường has had 851 descents, but canon establishes 847 as the current count with no indication of additional descents occurring.
The chapter implies Lan's real name was always known to Cường (he wrote it on the note), but canon states he didn't know the 'người tình ảo' was connected to a real patient until recent revelations.
The scar is described as having 'đập theo nhịp tim của Lan' at 40 bpm, but canon establishes the mark as a bruise from virtual contact, not a synchronized heartbeat monitor.

The chapter claims Cường wrote override code that 'khóa chín mươi phần trăm nhận thức, ép mở một trăm phần trăm phản ứng xúc giác' — this level of specific technical control exceeds his established competence (score 7, accountant not engineer).
canon_compliance.note: Multiple canon violations suggest the chapter was generated without careful cross-referencing of the world bible. The 851 vs 847 descent count is a clear numerical error. The recontextualization of the bruise into a synchronized heartbeat monitor introduces new mechanics not established in canon.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The explanation of how the override code works reads like an info-dump: 'Mã ghi đè chạy suốt bốn năm, giữ cô trong trạng thái nửa thức nửa ngủ — đủ để render thành "người tình ảo," đủ để phản ứng theo kịch bản, nhưng không đủ để sống.'
lore_integration.fix: Show the code running. Show Cường checking system logs and seeing the override parameters he set years ago. Let the reader understand what the code does through his interaction with it, not through narration.
lore_integration.note: The ping system and network infrastructure are used effectively as tension devices. The sensory deprivation tank and Neural Mantle suit are present but could be more viscerally described using the vocabulary wells. The world does work in this chapter — it's not just set dressing — but it sometimes pauses the story to explain itself.

engagement.weakest_moment: The long middle section where Cường paces, sits, calculates, and explains the three options reads like a planning document rather than a scene.
engagement.fix: Cut the three-option analysis entirely. Show him at the keyboard, fingers moving, face illuminated by screen light, making the decision through action. The reader should feel the weight of the choice through what he does, not through a pros-and-cons list.
engagement.note: The chapter's strongest engagement comes from the ping numbers climbing — they create genuine technical tension. The weakest engagement comes from emotional passages that tell rather than show. The ending ('Anh đổ bộ để quay về') is a solid emotional beat but arrives after too much internal deliberation. A reader who has made it to Chapter 18 will likely continue, but this chapter doesn't earn that continuation through craft.

three_weakest_sentences: Ý nghĩ ấy đến như một dao lạnh xuyên qua ngực.
Sự bão hòa của đau buồn, khi cơ thể không thể chứa thêm nữa và bắt đầu loại bỏ mọi thứ khác.
Bốn mươi phần trăm còn lại đang挣扎 — tín hiệu 47.3 Hz vẫn truyền từ cơ thể cô, qua mạng lưới, đến server của anh, đến vết sẹo trên ngực anh.
three_strongest_sentences: Tiếng nấc — nhỏ, khô, đau — bật ra từ cổ họng anh như tiếng máy in hết mực: cạch, cạch, cạch, cố in nhưng không có gì ra.
Hầm Haymarket đón anh bằng mùi ozon đặc quánh.
ai_patterns_detected: Uniform paragraph rhythm — most paragraphs are 3-5 sentences with similar structure (observation → emotional reaction → technical detail).
Three-option analysis presented symmetrically (if I do nothing / if I disconnect suddenly / if I disconnect slowly) — classic AI pattern of balanced enumeration.
Emotional explanations that name the emotion being felt ('Sự bão hòa của đau buồn,' 'Ý nghĩ ấy đến như một dao lạnh') rather than evoking it through sensation.
The phrase 'không phải... không phải... chỉ là...' appears multiple times as a rhetorical structure.
Several passages explain their own symbolism ('Đó không phải sự đánh đổi. Đó là sự trừng phạt.') rather than letting the reader interpret.
Unexplained Chinese character '挣扎' embedded in Vietnamese text — likely a generation artifact.
top_3_revisions: Fix all canon violations: change 851 to 847 descents, remove the synchronized heartbeat mechanic (keep the bruise as established), reduce Cường's technical agency to match his accountant competence — he should be working with existing system parameters, not writing override code.

Replace all abstract emotional explanations with physical sensations from the vocabulary wells. Every time the narrator names an emotion (despair, grief, emptiness), rewrite using body-before-emotion: stomach acid, muscle tremors, dry mouth, numbness in extremities.

Restructure the middle section: cut the three-option analysis and the note explanation. Show Cường at the keyboard discovering what he needs to do through interaction with the system, not through internal monologue. Let the ping numbers and system warnings create the tension his thoughts currently try to generate.
new_canon_entries: Cường's override code locked 90% of Lan's consciousness and forced 100% tactile response (needs reconciliation with established competence level).
A signal of 47.3 Hz transmits from Lan's body to Cường's scar (new mechanic, potentially conflicts with established bruise-only canon).
The note from Ch 15 was written by Cường's subconscious awareness during early descents as a failsafe against memory overwrite.
